meaning: adj.[植]聚伞花序的,聚伞状的
examples: Inflorescences cymose-paniculate, branches 6 – 8, each with 1 – 6 flowers, pedicels short.
Inflorescences cymose capitula with few sessile flowers, peduncle to 3 cm with recurved appressed fine hairs.
Genus of poisonous tropical American evergreen shrubs and trees having entire leaves and large cymose flowers.
